decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id corridor_first-second-avenues-brt, which correctly identifies this corridor: First Avenue/Second Avenue from South Ferry to 125th Street, 8.5 miles, Manhattan. The source 2010_02_25_brt_1st2nd_cb8 is already listed in that record's source_ids and the payload matches exactly (streets, limits, borough). The closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, so new is the correct decision.

proposed_relations.description: Both records describe the same physical corridor: First Avenue/Second Avenue from South Ferry to 125th Street in Manhattan, part of the M15 Select Bus Service / BRT project. The records share identical limits, borough, and streets; they differ only in minor corridor_name phrasing and source provenance.
